narration.label: Intro
narration.text: This walkthrough covers each LevelUp feature — kiosk, ID cards, themes, prizes, raffles, and admin modules.

narration.label: Kiosk
narration.text: Kiosk sign-in supports card, type, and scan workflows.

narration.label: ID cards
narration.text: Student ID cards with admin preview, print layouts, and scan-ready barcodes.

narration.label: Themes
narration.text: The theme designer builds card styles from a prompt and color palette with a live preview.

narration.label: Prizes
narration.text: Configurable prize catalog with inventory awareness.

narration.label: Coupons
narration.text: Teachers issue printable coupons tied to point rules.

narration.label: Raffle
narration.text: Scheduled raffles with ticket rules and winner workflows.

narration.label: Houses
narration.text: House sorting, team totals, and display options.

narration.label: Hall of Fame
narration.text: Public leaderboard displays for lifetime and period rankings.

narration.label: Notifications
narration.text: Notification policies for staff, inventory, and milestones.

narration.label: Bulletin
narration.text: Digital bulletin surfaces for announcements and media.

narration.label: Library
narration.text: Library module for loans, fees, and return incentives.

narration.label: Badges
narration.text: Achievement badges, goals, and category thresholds.

narration.label: Analytics
narration.text: Administrative insights across students and classes.

narration.label: Attendance
narration.text: Attendance capture integrated with kiosk sign-in.

narration.label: Outro
narration.text: LevelUp reduces tool sprawl while keeping students on scan-first hardware. Request a walkthrough for your district.
